_note: GREYWATER SHORE — a fishing game composed from FIVE REUSED hunt packs + ONE new one (lure). Same clock, same wind/alarm perception commons (a cast's splash spooks fish the way a gunshot spooks deer), same individual variation (affinity = 'this fish likes the lure more'), same fear/flight, same grazing (plankton). Only the lure pack is new. This file is the marketplace thesis in miniature.
